summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for KK-TRUST COMP. All 12 pytest backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI flows verified: Home loads with hero/stats/featured products, About page has Mission/Vision, Products page loads all 12 products and category filters work correctly (T-shirts/Sportswear/Gym Wear/Gloves return only matching products), Contact form submits successfully and persists to MongoDB with success toast shown.

issues: Browser tab title is still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'KK-TRUST COMP' - update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> tag for SEO/branding
Logo treatment splits 'KK-TRUST' (in blue box) and 'COMP' (as plain text outside) which looks visually disconnected; consider unifying

action_items: (Optional) Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'KK-TRUST COMP - Premium Textile Exports from Pakistan'
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER the routes that reference it (line 130 uses logger inside create_contact_inquiry, but logger is defined at line 335). It works at runtime because Python resolves names lazily, but it is fragile - move logging.basicConfig + logger definition to top of file (right after imports) for clarity.
server.py: Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); recommend migrating to lifespan context manager.
server.py: Category filter uses exact string match; would break if frontend sent different casing. Currently safe since frontend mirrors backend strings.
server.py: No pagination on GET /api/products and /api/contact-inquiries (.to_list(1000) hard cap) - acceptable for current scale but flag for future.
Contact.jsx: 'Get Quote' button in header and 'Request Custom Quote' button on Products page have no onClick handlers - they appear interactive but do nothing.
All pages: Good use of data-testid on contact form; consider adding data-testid to nav links, filter buttons, and product cards for future testability.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 12 products and 6 testimonials on startup. Tests created several TEST_-prefixed contact inquiries (not cleaned up - no DELETE endpoint exists; consider adding one).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run with: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All endpoints documented in server.py. Contact form on /contact page works end-to-end; data persists in MongoDB collection contact_inquiries.
